title.en: China-to-Uruguay Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入乌拉圭：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入烏拉圭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Uruguay UNIT conformity and IEC adoption context, URSEA distributed-generation and microgeneration rules, UTE grid-connection requirements, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与乌拉圭UNIT合格评定和IEC采纳背景、URSEA分布式发电和微发电规则、UTE并网要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数，以及中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與烏拉圭UNIT合格評定和IEC採納背景、URSEA分散式發電和微發電規則、UTE併網要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數，以及中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, UNIT conformity scope determination, URSEA regulatory approval, UTE grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Uruguay UNIT standards adoption, URSEA distributed-generation and microgeneration rules, UTE interconnection procedures, IEC standard editions, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、UNIT合格评定范围裁定、URSEA监管批准、UTE并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行乌拉圭UNIT标准采纳、URSEA分布式发电和微发电规则、UTE接入程序、IEC标准版本及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、UNIT合格評定範圍裁定、URSEA監管批准、UTE併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏拉圭UNIT標準採納、URSEA分散式發電和微發電規則、UTE接入程序、IEC標準版本及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Uruguay, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming UNIT-recognised conformity evidence and the applicable IEC editions for the exact inverter model; (2) URSEA and UTE distributed-generation or microgeneration connection requirements, including project registration, metering, and commissioning; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (4) IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface and anti-islanding evidence; (5) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (6) firmware validation for Uruguay's 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V grid and UTE-specific protection settings. Uruguay's 50 Hz system is closer to China on frequency, but China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is not automatically accepted as UNIT/URSEA/UTE conformity or connection evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口乌拉圭时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认特定逆变器型号适用的UNIT认可合格评定证据和IEC版本；（2）URSEA和UTE分布式发电或微发电接入要求，包括项目登记、计量和调试；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（4）IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口及防孤岛证据；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（6）针对乌拉圭50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V电网及UTE特定保护整定的固件验证。乌拉圭50 Hz系统在频率上更接近中国，但中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据不会自动被接受为UNIT/URSEA/UTE合格评定或并网证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口烏拉圭時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認特定逆變器型號適用的UNIT認可合格評定證據和IEC版本；（2）URSEA和UTE分散式發電或微發電接入要求，包括項目登記、計量和調試；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（4）IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面及防孤島證據；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（6）針對烏拉圭50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V電網及UTE特定保護整定的韌體驗證。烏拉圭50 Hz系統在頻率上更接近中國，但中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據不會自動被接受為UNIT/URSEA/UTE合格評定或併網證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
